div.head: The Secretary of State to the Chargé in Nicaragua (Hanna)
div.p: 148. Legation’s 258, October 29, 3 p.m. The Department has been informally advised that the J. G. White Management Corporation stated that it would terminate its management of the railroad on November 9 or at such other date prior to December 31 as the Board of Directors of the Railroad Company may decide. It is assumed, therefore, that the Nicaraguan Government will have full opportunity to make other arrangements before the White Management Corporation withdraws.
